1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""
3	rank_8l.py — composite 8L score → prioritized top-N ranking
4	============================================================
5	Scores every ticker in data/unified_screener.csv with a ROUTE-AWARE 8L composite
6	(each company graded by its correct lens, then placed on a common 0-100 scale),
7	and ranks them. Weights encode this research stream's validated findings:
8	  - cheapness (L1) + engine/runway COMPOUNDER>>YIELD>>LOWROIC (L2/L6)
9	  - cash-machine ◆ (L3), moat via ROE proxy (L4)
10	  - contrarian dislocation = buy fear (deep dd rewarded for quality & cyclicals)
11	  - banks: NPL-gate + coverage/CAR/ROE + PB-vs-ROE cheapness (own lens)
12	  - cyclicals: commodity-trough (low pctile) + dislocation + low PB (own lens)
13	  - VALUE_TRAP penalised; SPECIAL_SITUATION scored separately (event risk)
14	Input: data/unified_screener.csv, data/engine_class.csv
15	Output: data/rank_8l.{md,csv}
16	"""
17	import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
18	import sys, os, os, re
19	try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
20	except Exception: pass
21	import numpy as np, pandas as pd
22	WORKDIR=os.environ.get("WORKDIR_8L", r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude")
23	S=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.csv"))
24	# drop names the screener gated out (insolvency/falling-knife, bank AVOID, commodity-peak AVOID)
25	_drop=S["action"].astype(str).str.startswith("AVOID")|(S["verdict"]=="DISTRESSED")
26	print(f"excluded {int(_drop.sum())} gated names: "+", ".join(S[_drop]['ticker'].tolist()))
27	S=S[~_drop].reset_index(drop=True)
28	try:
29	    E=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","engine_class.csv")).set_index("ticker")
30	except Exception: E=pd.DataFrame()
31	try:
32	    MC=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","margin_cycle_detector.csv")).set_index("ticker")["cycle"].to_dict()
33	except Exception: MC={}
34	
35	def num(pat,s,d=np.nan):
36	    m=re.search(pat,str(s));
37	    return float(m.group(1)) if m else d
38	
39	def parse(r):
40	    s=r["detail"]; out={}
41	    out["PE"]=num(r"PE([\d.]+)",s); out["pe_z"]=num(r"pe_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
42	    out["PEG"]=num(r"PEG([\d.]+)",s); out["ROE"]=num(r"ROE(\d+)%",s)
43	    out["dd"]=num(r"dd([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["PB"]=num(r"PB([\d.]+)",s)
44	    out["pb_z"]=num(r"pb_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
45	    out["pctile"]=num(r"pctile([\d.]+)",s)
46	    cfy=num(r"CFOyld([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["cfo_yield"]=cfy/100 if pd.notna(cfy) else np.nan
47	    ul=num(r"UnRev/MV (\d+)%",s); out["un_lvl"]=ul/100 if pd.notna(ul) else np.nan
48	    uy=num(r"YoY([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["un_yoy"]=uy/100 if pd.notna(uy) else np.nan
49	    out["NPL"]=num(r"NPL([\d.]+)%",s); out["cov"]=num(r"cov(\d+)%",s)
50	    out["CAR"]=num(r"CAR(\d+)%",s); out["NPLchg"]=num(r"4qNPL([+-][\d.]+)pp",s)
51	    return pd.Series(out)
52	
53	P=S.join(S.apply(parse,axis=1))
54	
55	def asset_roic(t):
56	    if t in E.index: return E.loc[t,"asset_cagr"], E.loc[t,"roic5y"]
57	    return np.nan,np.nan
58	
59	def score_row(r):
60	    t=r["ticker"]; route=r["route"]; v=r["verdict"]; eng=str(r["engine"]); comp={}
61	    liq=r["liqB"] if pd.notna(r["liqB"]) else 0
62	    # ---- liquidity (deployability, modest; applies to all) — liqB is momentum-aware = max(3M-med,1M) ----
63	    comp["liq"]=8 if liq>=50 else 6 if liq>=10 else 4 if liq>=4 else 2 if liq>=2 else 0
64	    # rising-liquidity bonus (user/TV1): don't drop good names whose liquidity climbs on strong results
65	    if "liq RISING" in str(r["detail"]): comp["liq_rising"]=2
66	    if route=="COMPOUNDER":
67	        ac,roic=asset_roic(t); is_ap="ASSET_PLAY" in eng
68	        if is_ap:
69	            # L8 asset-play NAV = deferred-rev BACKLOG (primary, IC-validated +0.13–0.22@1Y, orthogonal to PB)
70	            #                   + P/B floor (secondary, IC≈0 but = asset margin-of-safety / land-bank value).
71	            # Additive handles both sub-types: pre-sold-backlog (NTC/SIP/IDC) AND land-bank-cheap-book (DTD/LHG).
72	            ul=r["un_lvl"]
73	            backlog=20 if (pd.notna(ul) and ul>=0.50) else 15 if (pd.notna(ul) and ul>=0.25) else 10 if (pd.notna(ul) and ul>=0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ul) and ul>=0.05) else 0
74	            uy=r["un_yoy"]   # pace = DURABILITY flag only (IC≈0 for return): backlog running off → small caution
75	            if backlog>0 and pd.notna(uy) and uy<-0.10: backlog-=2
76	            pb=r["PB"]; pb_floor=8 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<1.0) else 5 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.3) else 2 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.7) else 0
77	            comp["L8_backlog"]=backlog; comp["L8_pbfloor"]=pb_floor
78	            if v=="VALUE_TRAP": comp["L8_trap"]=-10
79	        else:
80	            # L1 valuation (PE/PEG, TTM growth)
81	            base={"CHEAP_QUALITY":25,"CHEAP_1lens":12,"NOT_CHEAP":2,"VALUE_TRAP":-15,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":8}.get(v,0)
82	            pez=r["pe_z"]; zbon=np.clip(-pez,-1,2)*5 if pd.notna(pez) else 0           # cheaper-than-own-history
83	            peg=r["PEG"]; pegbon=8 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=0.5) else 5 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=1) else 0
84	            comp["L1_value"]=base+zbon+pegbon
85	            # L1 cash-yield (IC-validated, orthogonal to PB; floor 0 so reinvesting compounders aren't penalised)
86	            cfy=r["cfo_yield"]
87	            comp["L1_cash"]=10 if (pd.notna(cfy) and cfy>=0.20) else 7 if (pd.notna(cfy) and cfy>=0.12) else 4 if (pd.notna(cfy) and cfy>=0.07) else 1 if (pd.notna(cfy) and cfy>=0.03) else 0
88	            if pd.notna(cfy) and cfy>=0.12 and "◆" in eng: comp["L1_cash"]+=3   # confirms cheap genuine cash-machine
89	            # refinement #1: HYBRID-IP backlog bonus — non-asset-play compounder w/ meaningful deferred-lease
90	            # (UnRev/MktCap≥10%, e.g. VGC ~70% IP profit) carries land/IP NAV BEYOND operating earnings.
91	            # Bonus on top (not a lens flip) — operating value already credited via L1_value/cash.
92	            ulh=r["un_lvl"]
93	            if pd.notna(ulh) and ulh>=0.10: comp["L8_hybrid"]=8 if ulh>=0.30 else 5 if ulh>=0.15 else 3
94	        # L2/L6 engine + runway
95	        comp["L2_engine"]={"COMPOUNDER":22,"YIELD":8,"LOWROIC_GROWTH":3}.get(eng.split()[0].replace("◆","") if eng and eng!="-" else "-",6)
96	        comp["L6_runway"]=8 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.05) else 1 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0) else -2
97	        # L3 cash-machine
98	        comp["L3_cash"]=10 if "◆" in eng else 0
99	        # L4 moat (ROE proxy)
100	        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["L4_moat"]=15 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=30) else 10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18) else 5 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=12) else 0
101	        # contrarian dislocation (buy fear in quality)
102	        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 5 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 2 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
103	        # L5 margin-cycle: peak margin = cyclically-inflated EPS (penalty); crushed margin = revert↑ opportunity.
104	        # Read from BOTH the margin_cycle CSV AND the screener detail (latter includes injected freight-rate
105	        # cyclicals like HAH whose NPM-percentile peak the commodity-only detector misses).
106	        dets=str(r["detail"])
107	        if MC.get(t)=="MARGIN_PEAK" or "MARGIN_PEAK" in dets: comp["L5_margin"]=-12
108	        elif MC.get(t)=="MARGIN_BOTTOM" or "MARGIN_BOTTOM" in dets: comp["L5_margin"]=+8
109	        # paired-peer overlay: INFO-ONLY flag (no score penalty). GPM-corr test (gpm_corr.py) showed
110	        # margin co-movement is WEAK even same-input (BMP-NTP ΔGPM +0.09 contemp; only +0.33 at 1q lag),
111	        # so it's a WATCH note (shown in screener detail), not a confirmed penalty. Revisit after observing
112	        # whether next-quarter margin compression actually follows the lead peer.
113	        pass
114	    elif route=="BANK":
115	        gate=v
116	        comp["gate"]={"CLEAN":40,"WATCH":15,"AVOID":-20}.get(gate,0)
117	        npl=r["NPL"]; comp["npl"]=15 if npl<1 else 12 if npl<1.5 else 8 if npl<2 else 4 if npl<2.5 else 2 if npl<3 else -5
118	        cov=r["cov"]; comp["coverage"]=10 if cov>=150 else 8 if cov>=100 else 5 if cov>=80 else 2 if cov>=50 else 0
119	        car=r["CAR"]; comp["CAR"]=6 if car>=14 else 5 if car>=12 else 3 if car>=10 else 1
120	        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["roe"]=10 if roe>=20 else 8 if roe>=17 else 5 if roe>=14 else 2 if roe>=10 else 0
121	        ch=r["NPLchg"]; comp["npl_trend"]=8 if ch<=-0.4 else 5 if ch<0 else -3 if ch>0.3 else 0
122	        pb=r["PB"]; rpb=(roe/pb) if (pd.notna(pb) and pb>0) else 0
123	        comp["pb_vs_roe"]=10 if rpb>=15 else 7 if rpb>=12 else 4 if rpb>=10 else 1   # ROE%/PB
124	    elif route=="CYCLICAL":
125	        comp["regime"]={"TROUGH_BUY":45,"cmdty_CHEAP":30,"ELEVATED-SUPPORTED":18,"cmdty_MID":10,
126	                        "cmdty_PEAK":-5,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":12}.get(v.split("(")[0],8)
127	        pct=r["pctile"]; comp["cmdty_pctile"]=round((1-pct)*20,1) if pd.notna(pct) else 0  # trough=high
128	        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=15 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 12 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-25) else 8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 4 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
129	        pb=r["PB"]; comp["PB"]=-10 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<=0) else 10 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<0.9) else 6 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.2) else 3 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.6) else 0
130	        # follow-up #2: cyclical-route asset-plays (rubber land-banks PHR/DPR) carry land/IP NAV beyond the
131	        # commodity cycle → add a MODEST backlog credit (secondary to the commodity read).
132	        if "ASSET_PLAY" in eng:
133	            ul=r["un_lvl"]
134	            if pd.notna(ul) and ul>0.02:
135	                comp["L8_backlog"]=10 if ul>=0.25 else 6 if ul>=0.12 else 3 if ul>=0.05 else 0
136	    elif route=="POWER":
137	        # debt-paydown LIFECYCLE (validated power_lifecycle_ic.py): PRE_INFLECTION+cheap = 2Y +53%/win89%;
138	        # debt-free=mature/yield (re-rated); debt-rising/CFO-neg=distress. Score by lifecycle stage + ROE + PB.
139	        comp["lifecycle"]={"PRE_INFLECTION_CHEAP":45,"PRE_INFLECTION":40,"PRE_INFLECTION_RICH":25,
140	                           "MID_CYCLE":18,"MATURE_YIELD":15,"DEBT_STRESS":-12,"UNKNOWN":0}.get(str(v),0)
141	        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["roe"]=10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=20) else 7 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=15) else 4 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=10) else 0
142	        pb=r["PB"]; comp["PB"]=12 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<1.0) else 7 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.5) else 3 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<2) else 0
143	    score=sum(comp.values())
144	    return pd.Series({"score":round(score,1),**{f"_{k}":round(v,1) for k,v in comp.items()}})
145	
146	R=P.join(P.apply(score_row,axis=1))
147	# CALIBRATION: cfo_yield (IC measured cross-sectionally = within-cohort ranking) only applies to
148	# non-asset-play compounders. Adding it raw would inflate their ABSOLUTE score vs banks/cyclicals
149	# (which can't be cash-yield-scored) and tilt the route mix. Demean it within the compounder cohort
150	# so it RE-RANKS compounders among themselves (preserves variation) without cross-route inflation.
151	if "_L1_cash" in R.columns:
152	    msk=R["_L1_cash"].notna(); m=R.loc[msk,"_L1_cash"].mean()
153	    R.loc[msk,"score"]=(R.loc[msk,"score"]-m).round(1)
154	    print(f"cfo_yield centered within compounder cohort (mean {m:.1f} removed, zero-sum re-rank)")
155	R=R.sort_values("score",ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
156	R["rank"]=R.index+1
157	
158	# ---- output ----
159	cols=["rank","ticker","route","verdict","engine","score","liqB"]
160	lines=[]; pr=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
161	pr("# 8L composite ranking — route-aware score (snapshot ~2026-05-29, market state NEUTRAL)")
162	pr(f"scored {len(R)} tickers | weights encode: cheapness + engine/runway + cash-machine + moat + dislocation; banks=NPL-gate+PB/ROE; cyclicals=trough+dislocation+PB")
163	pr("")
164	pr(f"{'#':>3} {'tkr':<5}{'route':<11}{'verdict':<20}{'engine':<16}{'score':>6} {'liqB':>6}  components")
165	for _,r in R.head(35).iterrows():
166	    comps=" ".join(f"{k[1:]}{r[k]:+.0f}" for k in R.columns if k.startswith("_") and pd.notna(r[k]) and r[k]!=0)
167	    pr(f"{r['rank']:>3} {r['ticker']:<5}{r['route']:<11}{str(r['verdict'])[:19]:<20}{str(r['engine'])[:15]:<16}{r['score']:>6.1f} {(r['liqB'] if pd.notna(r['liqB']) else 0):>6.0f}  {comps}")
168	pr("")
169	pr("## Prioritized TOP-20 (by 8L composite)")
170	top=R.head(20)
171	pr("  "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in top.iterrows()))
172	pr("")
173	pr("## TOP-20 by route")
174	for rt in ["BANK","CYCLICAL","COMPOUNDER"]:
175	    g=top[top["route"]==rt]
176	    pr(f"  {rt} ({len(g)}): "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in g.iterrows()))
177	pr("")
178	pr("Caveat: composite is a PRIORITIZATION aid, not a buy signal. NEUTRAL state (FA/quality edge strongest in CRISIS/BEAR per fa-horizon study). Liquidity small names hard to deploy. SPECIAL_SITUATION (DGC/PAT) carry event risk not in score.")
179	R[cols+[c for c in R.columns if c.startswith("_")]].to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.csv"),index=False)
180	with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
181	pr("Saved data/rank_8l.{md,csv}")
182

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
rank_8l.py — composite 8L score → prioritized top-N ranking
============================================================
Scores every ticker in data/unified_screener.csv with a ROUTE-AWARE 8L composite
(each company graded by its correct lens, then placed on a common 0-100 scale),
and ranks them. Weights encode this research stream's validated findings:
  - cheapness (L1) + engine/runway COMPOUNDER>>YIELD>>LOWROIC (L2/L6)
  - cash-machine ◆ (L3), moat via ROE proxy (L4)
  - contrarian dislocation = buy fear (deep dd rewarded for quality & cyclicals)
  - banks: NPL-gate + coverage/CAR/ROE + PB-vs-ROE cheapness (own lens)
  - cyclicals: commodity-trough (low pctile) + dislocation + low PB (own lens)
  - VALUE_TRAP penalised; SPECIAL_SITUATION scored separately (event risk)
Input: data/unified_screener.csv, data/engine_class.csv
Output: data/rank_8l.{md,csv}
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys, os, os, re
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=os.environ.get("WORKDIR_8L", r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude")
S=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.csv"))
# drop names the screener gated out (insolvency/falling-knife, bank AVOID, commodity-peak AVOID)
_drop=S["action"].astype(str).str.startswith("AVOID")|(S["verdict"]=="DISTRESSED")
print(f"excluded {int(_drop.sum())} gated names: "+", ".join(S[_drop]['ticker'].tolist()))
S=S[~_drop].reset_index(drop=True)
try:
    E=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","engine_class.csv")).set_index("ticker")
except Exception: E=pd.DataFrame()
try:
    MC=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","margin_cycle_detector.csv")).set_index("ticker")["cycle"].to_dict()
except Exception: MC={}

def num(pat,s,d=np.nan):
    m=re.search(pat,str(s));
    return float(m.group(1)) if m else d

def parse(r):
    s=r["detail"]; out={}
    out["PE"]=num(r"PE([\d.]+)",s); out["pe_z"]=num(r"pe_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
    out["PEG"]=num(r"PEG([\d.]+)",s); out["ROE"]=num(r"ROE(\d+)%",s)
    out["dd"]=num(r"dd([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["PB"]=num(r"PB([\d.]+)",s)
    out["pb_z"]=num(r"pb_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
    out["pctile"]=num(r"pctile([\d.]+)",s)
    cfy=num(r"CFOyld([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["cfo_yield"]=cfy/100 if pd.notna(cfy) else np.nan
    ul=num(r"UnRev/MV (\d+)%",s); out["un_lvl"]=ul/100 if pd.notna(ul) else np.nan
    uy=num(r"YoY([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["un_yoy"]=uy/100 if pd.notna(uy) else np.nan
    out["NPL"]=num(r"NPL([\d.]+)%",s); out["cov"]=num(r"cov(\d+)%",s)
    out["CAR"]=num(r"CAR(\d+)%",s); out["NPLchg"]=num(r"4qNPL([+-][\d.]+)pp",s)
    return pd.Series(out)

P=S.join(S.apply(parse,axis=1))

def asset_roic(t):
    if t in E.index: return E.loc[t,"asset_cagr"], E.loc[t,"roic5y"]
    return np.nan,np.nan

def score_row(r):
    t=r["ticker"]; route=r["route"]; v=r["verdict"]; eng=str(r["engine"]); comp={}
    liq=r["liqB"] if pd.notna(r["liqB"]) else 0
    # ---- liquidity (deployability, modest; applies to all) — liqB is momentum-aware = max(3M-med,1M) ----
    comp["liq"]=8 if liq>=50 else 6 if liq>=10 else 4 if liq>=4 else 2 if liq>=2 else 0
    # rising-liquidity bonus (user/TV1): don't drop good names whose liquidity climbs on strong results
    if "liq RISING" in str(r["detail"]): comp["liq_rising"]=2
    if route=="COMPOUNDER":
        ac,roic=asset_roic(t); is_ap="ASSET_PLAY" in eng
        if is_ap:
            # L8 asset-play NAV = deferred-rev BACKLOG (primary, IC-validated +0.13–0.22@1Y, orthogonal to PB)
            #                   + P/B floor (secondary, IC≈0 but = asset margin-of-safety / land-bank value).
            # Additive handles both sub-types: pre-sold-backlog (NTC/SIP/IDC) AND land-bank-cheap-book (DTD/LHG).
            ul=r["un_lvl"]
            backlog=20 if (pd.notna(ul) and ul>=0.50) else 15 if (pd.notna(ul) and ul>=0.25) else 10 if (pd.notna(ul) and ul>=0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ul) and ul>=0.05) else 0
            uy=r["un_yoy"]   # pace = DURABILITY flag only (IC≈0 for return): backlog running off → small caution
            if backlog>0 and pd.notna(uy) and uy<-0.10: backlog-=2
            pb=r["PB"]; pb_floor=8 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<1.0) else 5 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.3) else 2 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.7) else 0
            comp["L8_backlog"]=backlog; comp["L8_pbfloor"]=pb_floor
            if v=="VALUE_TRAP": comp["L8_trap"]=-10
        else:
            # L1 valuation (PE/PEG, TTM growth)
            base={"CHEAP_QUALITY":25,"CHEAP_1lens":12,"NOT_CHEAP":2,"VALUE_TRAP":-15,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":8}.get(v,0)
            pez=r["pe_z"]; zbon=np.clip(-pez,-1,2)*5 if pd.notna(pez) else 0           # cheaper-than-own-history
            peg=r["PEG"]; pegbon=8 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=0.5) else 5 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=1) else 0
            comp["L1_value"]=base+zbon+pegbon
            # L1 cash-yield (IC-validated, orthogonal to PB; floor 0 so reinvesting compounders aren't penalised)
            cfy=r["cfo_yield"]
            comp["L1_cash"]=10 if (pd.notna(cfy) and cfy>=0.20) else 7 if (pd.notna(cfy) and cfy>=0.12) else 4 if (pd.notna(cfy) and cfy>=0.07) else 1 if (pd.notna(cfy) and cfy>=0.03) else 0
            if pd.notna(cfy) and cfy>=0.12 and "◆" in eng: comp["L1_cash"]+=3   # confirms cheap genuine cash-machine
            # refinement #1: HYBRID-IP backlog bonus — non-asset-play compounder w/ meaningful deferred-lease
            # (UnRev/MktCap≥10%, e.g. VGC ~70% IP profit) carries land/IP NAV BEYOND operating earnings.
            # Bonus on top (not a lens flip) — operating value already credited via L1_value/cash.
            ulh=r["un_lvl"]
            if pd.notna(ulh) and ulh>=0.10: comp["L8_hybrid"]=8 if ulh>=0.30 else 5 if ulh>=0.15 else 3
        # L2/L6 engine + runway
        comp["L2_engine"]={"COMPOUNDER":22,"YIELD":8,"LOWROIC_GROWTH":3}.get(eng.split()[0].replace("◆","") if eng and eng!="-" else "-",6)
        comp["L6_runway"]=8 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.05) else 1 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0) else -2
        # L3 cash-machine
        comp["L3_cash"]=10 if "◆" in eng else 0
        # L4 moat (ROE proxy)
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["L4_moat"]=15 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=30) else 10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18) else 5 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=12) else 0
        # contrarian dislocation (buy fear in quality)
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 5 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 2 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        # L5 margin-cycle: peak margin = cyclically-inflated EPS (penalty); crushed margin = revert↑ opportunity.
        # Read from BOTH the margin_cycle CSV AND the screener detail (latter includes injected freight-rate
        # cyclicals like HAH whose NPM-percentile peak the commodity-only detector misses).
        dets=str(r["detail"])
        if MC.get(t)=="MARGIN_PEAK" or "MARGIN_PEAK" in dets: comp["L5_margin"]=-12
        elif MC.get(t)=="MARGIN_BOTTOM" or "MARGIN_BOTTOM" in dets: comp["L5_margin"]=+8
        # paired-peer overlay: INFO-ONLY flag (no score penalty). GPM-corr test (gpm_corr.py) showed
        # margin co-movement is WEAK even same-input (BMP-NTP ΔGPM +0.09 contemp; only +0.33 at 1q lag),
        # so it's a WATCH note (shown in screener detail), not a confirmed penalty. Revisit after observing
        # whether next-quarter margin compression actually follows the lead peer.
        pass
    elif route=="BANK":
        gate=v
        comp["gate"]={"CLEAN":40,"WATCH":15,"AVOID":-20}.get(gate,0)
        npl=r["NPL"]; comp["npl"]=15 if npl<1 else 12 if npl<1.5 else 8 if npl<2 else 4 if npl<2.5 else 2 if npl<3 else -5
        cov=r["cov"]; comp["coverage"]=10 if cov>=150 else 8 if cov>=100 else 5 if cov>=80 else 2 if cov>=50 else 0
        car=r["CAR"]; comp["CAR"]=6 if car>=14 else 5 if car>=12 else 3 if car>=10 else 1
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["roe"]=10 if roe>=20 else 8 if roe>=17 else 5 if roe>=14 else 2 if roe>=10 else 0
        ch=r["NPLchg"]; comp["npl_trend"]=8 if ch<=-0.4 else 5 if ch<0 else -3 if ch>0.3 else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; rpb=(roe/pb) if (pd.notna(pb) and pb>0) else 0
        comp["pb_vs_roe"]=10 if rpb>=15 else 7 if rpb>=12 else 4 if rpb>=10 else 1   # ROE%/PB
    elif route=="CYCLICAL":
        comp["regime"]={"TROUGH_BUY":45,"cmdty_CHEAP":30,"ELEVATED-SUPPORTED":18,"cmdty_MID":10,
                        "cmdty_PEAK":-5,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":12}.get(v.split("(")[0],8)
        pct=r["pctile"]; comp["cmdty_pctile"]=round((1-pct)*20,1) if pd.notna(pct) else 0  # trough=high
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=15 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 12 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-25) else 8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 4 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; comp["PB"]=-10 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<=0) else 10 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<0.9) else 6 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.2) else 3 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.6) else 0
        # follow-up #2: cyclical-route asset-plays (rubber land-banks PHR/DPR) carry land/IP NAV beyond the
        # commodity cycle → add a MODEST backlog credit (secondary to the commodity read).
        if "ASSET_PLAY" in eng:
            ul=r["un_lvl"]
            if pd.notna(ul) and ul>0.02:
                comp["L8_backlog"]=10 if ul>=0.25 else 6 if ul>=0.12 else 3 if ul>=0.05 else 0
    elif route=="POWER":
        # debt-paydown LIFECYCLE (validated power_lifecycle_ic.py): PRE_INFLECTION+cheap = 2Y +53%/win89%;
        # debt-free=mature/yield (re-rated); debt-rising/CFO-neg=distress. Score by lifecycle stage + ROE + PB.
        comp["lifecycle"]={"PRE_INFLECTION_CHEAP":45,"PRE_INFLECTION":40,"PRE_INFLECTION_RICH":25,
                           "MID_CYCLE":18,"MATURE_YIELD":15,"DEBT_STRESS":-12,"UNKNOWN":0}.get(str(v),0)
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["roe"]=10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=20) else 7 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=15) else 4 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=10) else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; comp["PB"]=12 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<1.0) else 7 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.5) else 3 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<2) else 0
    score=sum(comp.values())
    return pd.Series({"score":round(score,1),**{f"_{k}":round(v,1) for k,v in comp.items()}})

R=P.join(P.apply(score_row,axis=1))
# CALIBRATION: cfo_yield (IC measured cross-sectionally = within-cohort ranking) only applies to
# non-asset-play compounders. Adding it raw would inflate their ABSOLUTE score vs banks/cyclicals
# (which can't be cash-yield-scored) and tilt the route mix. Demean it within the compounder cohort
# so it RE-RANKS compounders among themselves (preserves variation) without cross-route inflation.
if "_L1_cash" in R.columns:
    msk=R["_L1_cash"].notna(); m=R.loc[msk,"_L1_cash"].mean()
    R.loc[msk,"score"]=(R.loc[msk,"score"]-m).round(1)
    print(f"cfo_yield centered within compounder cohort (mean {m:.1f} removed, zero-sum re-rank)")
R=R.sort_values("score",ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
R["rank"]=R.index+1

# ---- output ----
cols=["rank","ticker","route","verdict","engine","score","liqB"]
lines=[]; pr=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
pr("# 8L composite ranking — route-aware score (snapshot ~2026-05-29, market state NEUTRAL)")
pr(f"scored {len(R)} tickers | weights encode: cheapness + engine/runway + cash-machine + moat + dislocation; banks=NPL-gate+PB/ROE; cyclicals=trough+dislocation+PB")
pr("")
pr(f"{'#':>3} {'tkr':<5}{'route':<11}{'verdict':<20}{'engine':<16}{'score':>6} {'liqB':>6}  components")
for _,r in R.head(35).iterrows():
    comps=" ".join(f"{k[1:]}{r[k]:+.0f}" for k in R.columns if k.startswith("_") and pd.notna(r[k]) and r[k]!=0)
    pr(f"{r['rank']:>3} {r['ticker']:<5}{r['route']:<11}{str(r['verdict'])[:19]:<20}{str(r['engine'])[:15]:<16}{r['score']:>6.1f} {(r['liqB'] if pd.notna(r['liqB']) else 0):>6.0f}  {comps}")
pr("")
pr("## Prioritized TOP-20 (by 8L composite)")
top=R.head(20)
pr("  "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in top.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("## TOP-20 by route")
for rt in ["BANK","CYCLICAL","COMPOUNDER"]:
    g=top[top["route"]==rt]
    pr(f"  {rt} ({len(g)}): "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in g.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("Caveat: composite is a PRIORITIZATION aid, not a buy signal. NEUTRAL state (FA/quality edge strongest in CRISIS/BEAR per fa-horizon study). Liquidity small names hard to deploy. SPECIAL_SITUATION (DGC/PAT) carry event risk not in score.")
R[cols+[c for c in R.columns if c.startswith("_")]].to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.csv"),index=False)
with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
pr("Saved data/rank_8l.{md,csv}")

1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""
3	dna_card.py — self-contained per-ticker "investment DNA card" (8 dims, 100% coverage)
4\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
5	Drop in ANY ticker → full profile across every dimension built this session.
6	Computes all dims ON THE FLY from BQ (ICB-fallback router → works for any ticker,
7	not just the quality universe). Banks pull real NPL/CAR from cached vnstock (bank_lens_v3).
8	Dims: ROUTE(ICB) · VALUATION(multi-lens) · ENGINE(runway×ROIC) · CASH◆ · MOAT ·
9	      MARGIN-CYCLE · RUNWAY/TAM · EVENT.
10	Usage: edit DEMO list (or pass tickers). Output: data/dna_cards.md + .csv
11	"""
12	import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
13	import sys
14	try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
15	except Exception: pass
16	import os, subprocess, tempfile
17	from io import StringIO
18	import numpy as np, pandas as pd
19	PROJECT="[REDACTED]"; BQ_BIN=os.environ.get("BQ_BIN", (r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd" if os.name=="nt" else "bq"))
20	W=os.environ.get("WORKDIR_8L", r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude")
21	COMMODITY_MAP={"DRI":"rubber","PHR":"rubber","DPR":"rubber","GVR":"rubber","TRC":"rubber","HRC":"rubber",
22	 "HPG":"iron_ore","HSG":"iron_ore","NKG":"iron_ore","SMC":"iron_ore","POM":"iron_ore","DCM":"urea","DPM":"urea",
23	 "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap","CSV":"dap"}
24	MOAT_TYPE={"VCS":"TECH+BRAND(global TM)","DGC":"SCALE+vert-integ","BMP":"BRAND(pipes S/Central)","VNM":"BRAND(dairy)",
25	 "DRC":"NONE(commodity tire)","CSM":"NONE(commodity tire)","DHC":"LOCATION(South paper)","HPG":"SCALE+cost(steel)",
26	 "FPT":"TECH(software export)","MWG":"SCALE+exec(retail)","FRT":"network/exec(pharma)","QTP":"none(fixed utility)",
27	 "PNJ":"BRAND(jewelry)","SCS":"infra-monopoly(cargo)","NCT":"infra(cargo)","SAB":"BRAND(beer)","MCH":"BRAND(consumer)",
28	 "DHG":"BRAND(pharma)","DPR":"land-bank(rubber)","ACB":"bank-franchise","MBB":"bank-CASA-franchise","VCB":"bank-premier"}
29	EXPORT={"DGC","VCS","FMC","VHC","ANV","MPC","TNG","MSH","STK","TCM","PTB","GIL","FPT","DRC","CSM"}
30	STRUCTURAL={"HPG","HSG","NKG"}

32	        "PAT":"DGC-group apatite arm, same event"}
33	DEMO=[a.upper() for a in sys.argv[1:]] if len(sys.argv)>1 else ["VCS","DGC","DRC","DHC","BMP","QTP","HPG","FRT","VNM","MWG","PNJ","SCS","FMC","ACB","MBB","DPR","CSM","DHG","NKG","DCM"]
34	
35	def bq(sql):
36	    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
37	    try: r=subprocess.run(f'{"type" if os.name=="nt" else "cat"} "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=2000000',capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=400,shell=True)
38	    finally:
39	        try: os.unlink(tmp)
40	        except: pass
41	    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))
42	
43	tks="','".join(DEMO)
44	# A) latest snapshot
45	snap=bq(f"""WITH lt AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.PB IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.ticker),
46	hiw AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.Close) hi FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>=DATE_SUB(DATE '2026-05-29',INTERVAL 365 DAY) GROUP BY t.ticker)
47	SELECT t.ticker,CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) sec,t.ICB_Code, ROUND(t.PE,1) PE,
48	 ROUND((t.PE-t.PE_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y,0),2) pe_z, ROUND((t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0),2) pb_z, t.PB,
49	 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1,3) np_yoy, ROUND(t.ROE5Y*100,1) roe5y, ROUND(t.ROIC5Y*100,1) roic5y,
50	 ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF(hiw.hi,0)-1,2) dd, ROUND(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close/1e9,1) liqB
51	FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN lt ON lt.ticker=t.ticker AND lt.mx=t.time JOIN hiw ON hiw.ticker=t.ticker""").set_index("ticker")
52	# B) quarterly series
53	q=bq(f"""SELECT t.ticker,t.time,t.NP_P0,t.CF_OA_P0,t.totalAsset_P0,t.Cash_P0,t.OShares,t.Revenue_P0,t.GPM_P0
54	FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>='2011-01-01' ORDER BY t.ticker,t.time""")
55	q["time"]=pd.to_datetime(q["time"])
56	try: bank=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","bank_lens_v3.csv")).set_index("ticker")
57	except Exception: bank=pd.DataFrame()
58	# refinements: structural overlay (cyclical) + asset-play (NAV) flag
59	try:

61	    CYC_STRUCT={r["ticker"]:(r["verdict"],r["structure"]) for _,r in cs.iterrows()}
62	except Exception: CYC_STRUCT={}
63	try:
64	    ap=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","asset_play.csv"))
65	    ASSET_PLAY=set(ap[ap["verdict"]=="ASSET_PLAY"]["ticker"])
66	except Exception: ASSET_PLAY=set()
67	comm={}
68	for c in set(COMMODITY_MAP.values()):
69	    try:
70	        d=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data",f"{c}_monthly.csv")); d.columns=["m","p"]

lastPrompt: hãy quay lại với hệ thống 8L của chúng ta, hiện nay hệ thống sẽ chỉ đưa các cổ phiếu đầu tư được vào universe và ranking phải không? các cổ phiếu nằm ngoài danh sách không được ranking, xếp hạng sao?

content.text:
Đúng, bạn nắm chính xác — nhưng cần phân biệt **2 tầng output khác nhau** của 8L, vì chúng có phạm vi phủ rất khác nhau:

## 1. Pipeline screener + ranking — CÓ lọc universe trước (bạn nói đúng)

`unified_screener.py` xây universe ở [unified_screener.py:116-119](unified_screener.py:116):

```python
quality = ≥70% lịch sử ở tier A/B  AND  ≥12 quý lịch sử  AND  hiện tại tier A/B
universe = quality  ∪  COMMODITY_MAP(~18 mã cyclical hardcode)  ∪  bank_set  ∪  POWER_set
```

Nghĩa là một mã chỉ vào universe nếu thuộc **1 trong 4 nhóm**:
- **COMPOUNDER chất lượng**: phải qua gate FA (≥70% thời gian là tier A/B, đủ ≥12 quý, đang A/B)
- **BANK** (ICB 8355) — vào bất kể chất lượng (có lăng kính NPL/CAR riêng)
- **POWER** (ICB 7535) — tương tự
- **CYCLICAL** — chỉ ~18 mã được map tay trong `COMMODITY_MAP`

→ Một compounder **FA yếu** (chưa bao giờ đạt tier A/B đủ lâu), **không** phải bank/power, **không** nằm trong commodity map → **không bao giờ vào universe** → không được screen, không được rank.

Thêm nữa, `rank_8l.py` còn **loại tiếp** ngay trong universe ([rank_8l.py:25-27](rank_8l.py:25)): mọi mã `action` bắt đầu bằng `AVOID` hoặc `verdict == DISTRESSED` (mất khả năng thanh toán, bank AVOID, commodity-peak) đều bị bỏ khỏi bảng xếp hạng.

Vậy "danh sách rank" = đã qua **2 lớp lọc**: (a) gate vào universe, (b) gate loại AVOID/DISTRESSED.

## 2. `dna_card.py` — 100% coverage, KHÔNG cần universe

Đây là "cửa thoát" cho đúng câu hỏi của bạn. Theo docstring [dna_card.py:5-8](dna_card.py:5):

> Drop in **ANY ticker** → full profile across every dimension... Computes all dims ON THE FLY from BQ (**ICB-fallback router → works for any ticker, not just the quality universe**).

Tức là **bất kỳ mã nào** — kể cả mã FA rác, mã ngoài universe, mã bị gate AVOID — đều có thể chạy `dna_card.py <TICKER>` để ra đủ hồ sơ 8 lăng kính (route, valuation, engine, cash, moat, margin-cycle, runway/TAM, event). Router dùng ICB-fallback nên không phụ thuộc danh sách quality.

## Tóm lại

| Công cụ | Phủ mã | Mục đích |
|---|---|---|
| `unified_screener.py` | Chỉ universe (4 nhóm, qua gate FA) | Sàng lọc rộng |
| `rank_8l.py` | Universe − (AVOID/DISTRESSED) | Xếp hạng top-N để ưu tiên |
| `dna_card.py` | **Mọi mã** (100%) | Soi sâu 1 mã bất kỳ |

Nên triết lý hệ thống là: **ranking chỉ dành cho mã đầu tư-được** (universe đã lọc chất lượng/khả năng định tuyến), còn **đánh giá thì phủ 100%** qua dna_card.

---

Một điểm đáng lưu ý nếu bạn muốn mở rộng: hiện `CYCLICAL` chỉ gồm ~18 mã **hardcode tay** trong `COMMODITY_MAP`. #!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
cyclical_multi.py — cyclical framework across commodity groups
==============================================================
Same contrarian-cyclical event study as rubber, now for steel/urea/DAP groups.
Commodity GOOD (price>trailing-36m median) vs WEAK × stock deep-dd → fwd 1Y/2Y.
Hypothesis (from rubber): buy at commodity TROUGH (WEAK) + stock dislocated.
Commodities: rubber(USD/kg), iron_ore(USD/t, steel proxy), urea, dap (USD/t).
Map: rubber→DRI/PHR/DPR/GVR/TRC/HRC ; iron_ore→HPG/HSG/NKG ; urea→DCM/DPM ; dap→DDV/DGC.
DGC note: real product = yellow phosphorus P4 (no clean history); DAP = partial phosphate-chain proxy.
Output: data/cyclical_multi.md
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"; BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
MAP={"rubber":["DRI","PHR","DPR","GVR","TRC","HRC"],"iron_ore":["HPG","HSG","NKG"],
     "urea":["DCM","DPM"],"dap":["DDV","DGC"]}
def bq(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try: r=subprocess.run(f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=2000000',capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=600,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))
def main():
    lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
    alltk=sorted({t for v in MAP.values() for t in v}); tks="','".join(alltk)
    df=bq(f"""SELECT t.ticker,t.time,t.Close,t.PB,
      SAFE_DIVIDE(LEAD(t.Close,252) OVER w,t.Close)-1 AS f1y,
      SAFE_DIVIDE(LEAD(t.Close,504) OVER w,t.Close)-1 AS f2y
      FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.Close IS NOT NULL
      WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time)""")
    df["time"]=pd.to_datetime(df["time"]); df=df.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    df["hi52"]=df.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x:x.rolling(252,min_periods=60).max())
    df["dd52"]=(df["Close"]/df["hi52"]-1)*100; df["month"]=df["time"].values.astype("datetime64[M]")
    me_all=df.groupby(["ticker","month"]).tail(1).copy()
    def cell(g):
        n=len(g.dropna(subset=["f1y"]))
        if n<10: return None
        return (f"{n:>5}{g['f1y'].median()*100:>+9.0f}%{(g['f1y']>0).mean()*100:>7.0f}%"
                f"{g['f2y'].median()*100:>+9.0f}%{(g['f2y']>0).mean()*100:>7.0f}%")
    P("# Cyclical framework across commodity groups (contrarian test)")
    P("buckets by commodity regime (price vs trailing-36m median) x stock deep-dd<-25%")
    P("")
    for com,tickers in MAP.items():
        rb=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data",f"{com}_monthly.csv"))
        rb.columns=["month","price"]; rb["month"]=pd.to_datetime(rb["month"]); rb=rb.sort_values("month")
        rb["med36"]=rb["price"].rolling(36,min_periods=18).median()
        rb["good"]=rb["price"]>rb["med36"]
        rb["pctile5y"]=rb["price"].rolling(60,min_periods=24).apply(lambda x:(x.iloc[-1]>=x).mean())
        avail=[t for t in tickers if t in me_all["ticker"].unique()]
        me=me_all[me_all["ticker"].isin(avail)].merge(rb[["month","good","price","pctile5y"]],on="month",how="left").dropna(subset=["good"])
        me["good"]=me["good"].astype(bool); me["deep"]=me["dd52"]<-25
        cur=rb.iloc[-1]
        P(f"## {com.upper()}  stocks={avail}  | latest {cur['price']:.0f}, good={bool(cur['good'])}, pctile5y={cur['pctile5y']:.2f} ({rb['month'].iloc[-1].date()})")
        P(f"{'bucket':<24}{'N':>5}{'1Ymed':>9}{'1Ywin':>7}{'2Ymed':>9}{'2Ywin':>7}")
        for rg,rl in [(False,"WEAK"),(True,"GOOD")]:
            for dp,dl in [(True,"+deep dd"),(False,"+normal")]:
                c=cell(me[(me["good"]==rg)&(me["deep"]==dp)])
                if c: P(f"{'commodity '+rl+' '+dl:<24}"+c)
        c=cell(me[~me["good"]]);
        if c: P(f"{'WEAK (any dd)':<24}"+c)
        c=cell(me[me["good"]]);
        if c: P(f"{'GOOD (any dd)':<24}"+c)
        P("")
    P("Read: across groups, if 'commodity WEAK + deep-dd' > 'GOOD', the contrarian")
    P("buy-the-trough pattern generalizes beyond rubber.")
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","cyclical_multi.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("\nSaved data/cyclical_multi.md")
if __name__=="__main__": main()

content.text:
SLS cycle cực rõ: **trough 2018-2019** (NP rớt về 5-21 tỷ, ROE_tr 11-12%) → **boom 2022-2024** (đỉnh Q2/2023 NP 224 tỷ, Q2/2024 235 tỷ, ROE_tr 54%) → và **Q1/2026 vừa sụp về 16 tỷ** (ROE_tr 16.7%) — có vẻ đang vào downcycle mới. Đúng như bạn mô tả.

Giờ tôi cần chuỗi giá đường thế giới (neo Thái Lan). Để tôi lấy dữ liệu.

Based on the search results, here's information about Vietnam's anti-dumping duties on Thai sugar in 2021:

## Initial Anti-Dumping Duty (February 2021)

An anti-dumping tax of 33.88% was placed on raw sugar originating from Thailand, with Thai refined sugar facing a levy of 48.88%. The Ministry's investigation was set to continue till the end of the second quarter of 2021.

## Impact on Domestic Sugar Prices

Thai sugar suppliers began to reduce their sales to Vietnam in anticipation of anti-dumping levies, which resulted in an increase in Vietnamese domestic sugar prices. Domestic refined sugar prices had risen to USD 650 - USD 690/MT (VND 15,000-16,000/kg) in February 2021, a sharp increase from the USD 580/MT (VND 13,300/kg) in Q4 last year.

## Official Implementation (June 2021)

In June 2021, the ministry levied an anti-dumping and anti-subsidy duty of 47.64% on several sugar products imported from Thailand for five years.

## Background and Impact on Industry

The increase in Thai sugar imports has been cited as the main cause of damage to the local Vietnamese sugar industry, pushing Vietnamese enterprises to lose market share and reduce production. The investigation led to preliminary results showing that subsidized sugar from Thailand surged to 1.3 million tonnes in 2020, up 330.4% from 2019.

content.text:
Tôi đã có đủ 2 mảnh ghép:

1. **Giá đường thế giới** (USD/kg, neo theo Thái — Thái là nước xuất khẩu định giá) 2006→2026-03, 240 tháng.
2. **Sự kiện cấu trúc then chốt**: Việt Nam áp thuế **chống bán phá giá (AD) 47.64% lên đường Thái từ 6/2021** (5 năm → hết hạn/rà soát ~6/2026), + thuế chống lẩn tránh 47.64% lên 5 nước ASEAN (8/2022, chặn đường Thái "đi vòng"). Đây chính là lý do biên LN ngành đường VN **bùng nổ 2022-2024 tách rời giá thế giới** — giống "deficit" của rubber hay "cost-anchor dầu" — một lớp phủ cấu trúc.

Tôi lưu chuỗi giá và dựng script phân tích theo đúng khuôn cyclical_multi.

Based on the search results, here's what I found regarding Vietnam's anti-dumping duty review on Thai sugar:

## End-of-Term Review Initiated

On June 13, 2025, the Ministry of Industry and Trade (MOIT) of Vietnam issued Decision No. 1686/QD-BCT to initiate an end-of-term review of the application of anti-dumping and countervailing measures on certain sugar products originating from Thailand.

## Purpose and Scope

This review is conducted in line with the regulations of the World Trade Organization (WTO) and Vietnamese trade remedy law, aiming to assess the necessity and effectiveness of maintaining the current trade remedy measures after four years of implementation. An end-of-term review seeks to determine whether the termination of existing measures would likely lead to the recurrence or continuation of dumping and subsidization and whether such actions would cause significant injury to the domestic industry.

## Current Duty Expiry Timeline

The tax rates are officially applied from August 18, 2023, to June 15, 2026. This expiry date of June 15, 2026 is when the current duties are scheduled to terminate unless extended following this review.

## Review Process

As part of the review process, the investigating agency will issue questionnaires to relevant stakeholders, including importers, exporters, producers and distributors, to gather information for analysis. The findings of this review will form the basis for the MOIT's final decision on whether to maintain or revoke the existing trade remedy measures on sugar from Thailand.

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
sugar_cyclical.py — cyclical framework for the Vietnamese SUGAR group\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Same contrarian-cyclical event study as rubber/steel/urea/dap, now for sugar.
Driver = world sugar price (USD/kg, Thai-export anchored). Group = SLS/SBT/LSS/KTS/QNS.

Sugar-specific structural overlay (the key difference vs other commodity groups):
  Vietnam imposed an ANTI-DUMPING (AD) duty of 47.64% on Thai sugar from Jun-2021
  (+ 47.64% anti-circumvention on 5 ASEAN re-routers from Aug-2022), running 5 years
  (review/expiry ~mid-2026). This decoupled the DOMESTIC sugar price UP from world
  price 2022-2024 (cheap Thai imports cut off) -> the 2022-24 profit boom is part
  world-price (2023 global deficit, India export ban) + part PROTECTION premium.
  Smuggled Thai sugar still caps the domestic premium partially (user's point).
  => we test the regime split PRE vs POST protection, not just world-price buckets.

QNS caveat: hybrid (Vinasoy soymilk ~half of profit) -> weaker pure-sugar signal.
Output: data/sugar_cyclical.md
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"; BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
TICKERS=["SLS","SBT","LSS","KTS","QNS"]
PROTECT_START=pd.Timestamp("2021-06-01")  # AD duty official

def bq(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try: r=subprocess.run(f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=2000000',capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=600,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

def main():
    lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
    tks="','".join(TICKERS)
    # ---- price series + forward returns ----
    df=bq(f"""SELECT t.ticker,t.time,t.Close,t.PB,
      SAFE_DIVIDE(LEAD(t.Close,252) OVER w,t.Close)-1 AS f1y,
      SAFE_DIVIDE(LEAD(t.Close,504) OVER w,t.Close)-1 AS f2y
      FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.Close IS NOT NULL
      WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time)""")
    df["time"]=pd.to_datetime(df["time"]); df=df.sort_values(["ticker","time"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    df["hi52"]=df.groupby("ticker")["Close"].transform(lambda x:x.rolling(252,min_periods=60).max())
    df["dd52"]=(df["Close"]/df["hi52"]-1)*100; df["month"]=df["time"].values.astype("datetime64[M]")
    me_all=df.groupby(["ticker","month"]).tail(1).copy()

    # ---- sugar regime ----
    rb=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","sugar_monthly.csv"))
    rb.columns=["month","price"]; rb["month"]=pd.to_datetime(rb["month"]); rb=rb.sort_values("month")
    rb["med36"]=rb["price"].rolling(36,min_periods=18).median()
    rb["good"]=rb["price"]>rb["med36"]
    rb["pctile5y"]=rb["price"].rolling(60,min_periods=24).apply(lambda x:(x.iloc[-1]>=x).mean())
    cur=rb.iloc[-1]

    def cell(g):
        n=len(g.dropna(subset=["f1y"]))
        if n<8: return None
        return (f"{n:>5}{g['f1y'].median()*100:>+9.0f}%{(g['f1y']>0).mean()*100:>7.0f}%"
                f"{g['f2y'].median()*100:>+9.0f}%{(g['f2y']>0).mean()*100:>7.0f}%")

    P("# SUGAR cyclical framework (Vietnam) — contrarian regime x dislocation test")
    P(f"driver = world sugar USD/kg | latest {cur['price']:.2f}, good(>med36)={bool(cur['good'])}, pctile5y={cur['pctile5y']:.2f} ({rb['month'].iloc[-1].date()})")
    P(f"group = {TICKERS} (QNS hybrid: Vinasoy ~half profit)")
    P(f"AD protection era: from {PROTECT_START.date()} (Thai AD 47.64%, 5y -> review ~mid-2026)")
    P("")

    avail=[t for t in TICKERS if t in me_all["ticker"].unique()]
    me=me_all[me_all["ticker"].isin(avail)].merge(rb[["month","good","price","pctile5y"]],on="month",how="left").dropna(subset=["good"])
    me["good"]=me["good"].astype(bool); me["deep"]=me["dd52"]<-25
    me["protected"]=me["month"]>=PROTECT_START

    P("## A) Group pooled: world-sugar regime x stock deep-dd<-25%")
    P(f"{'bucket':<26}{'N':>5}{'1Ymed':>9}{'1Ywin':>7}{'2Ymed':>9}{'2Ywin':>7}")
    for rg,rl in [(False,"WEAK"),(True,"GOOD")]:
        for dp,dl in [(True,"+deep dd"),(False,"+normal")]:
            c=cell(me[(me["good"]==rg)&(me["deep"]==dp)])
            if c: P(f"{'sugar '+rl+' '+dl:<26}"+c)
    for lab,msk in [("WEAK (any dd)",~me["good"]),("GOOD (any dd)",me["good"]),
                    ("deep-dd (any regime)",me["deep"]),("ALL",me["good"].notna())]:
        c=cell(me[msk])
        if c: P(f"{lab:<26}"+c)
    P("")

    P("## B) Protection-era split (structural overlay unique to sugar)")
    P(f"{'bucket':<26}{'N':>5}{'1Ymed':>9}{'1Ywin':>7}{'2Ymed':>9}{'2Ywin':>7}")
    for pr,pl in [(False,"PRE-protect"),(True,"PROTECTED")]:
        for lab,extra in [("all",me["good"].notna()),("WEAK",~me["good"]),("deep-dd",me["deep"])]:
            c=cell(me[(me["protected"]==pr)&extra])
            if c: P(f"{pl+' '+lab:<26}"+c)
    P("")

    P("## C) Per-ticker: world-sugar regime sensitivity (1Y fwd median)")
    P(f"{'tkr':<6}{'N':>5}{'WEAK_1Y':>9}{'GOOD_1Y':>9}{'deepdd_1Y':>11}{'spread':>8}")
    for t in avail:
        g=me[me["ticker"]==t]
        w=g[~g["good"]]["f1y"].median(); gd=g[g["good"]]["f1y"].median(); dd=g[g["deep"]]["f1y"].median()
        sp=(w-gd) if (pd.notna(w) and pd.notna(gd)) else np.nan
        P(f"{t:<6}{len(g.dropna(subset=['f1y'])):>5}"
          f"{(w*100 if pd.notna(w) else float('nan')):>+8.0f}%{(gd*100 if pd.notna(gd) else float('nan')):>+8.0f}%"
          f"{(dd*100 if pd.notna(dd) else float('nan')):>+10.0f}%{(sp*100 if pd.notna(sp) else float('nan')):>+7.0f}pp")
    P("")
    P("Read: WEAK>GOOD spread positive => contrarian buy-the-trough holds for sugar.")
    P("Protection era warps the world-price signal: domestic premium decoupled 2022-24.")
    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","sugar_cyclical.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
    P("\nSaved data/sugar_cyclical.md")

if __name__=="__main__": main()

## B) Protection-era split (structural overlay unique to sugar)
bucket                        N    1Ymed  1Ywin    2Ymed  2Ywin
PRE-protect all             605       +8%     56%      +21%     60%
PRE-protect WEAK            374       +0%     50%      +32%     63%

content.text:
## Kết quả: nhóm đường có quy luật NGƯỢC với các cyclical khác

Đây là phát hiện quan trọng. Tôi chạy đúng event-study đã dùng cho rubber/steel/urea/dap, và **đường phá vỡ quy luật contrarian**:

| Bucket (pooled 5 mã, 840 obs) | 1Y med | 1Y win | 2Y med |
|---|---|---|---|
| sugar **GOOD** + deep-dd | **+29%** | **72%** | +35% |
| sugar GOOD + normal | +9% | 62% | +15% |
| sugar **WEAK** + deep-dd | **−4%** | 41% | +3% |
| sugar WEAK + normal | +5% | 47% | +50% |

Với rubber/steel/urea/dap, **"commodity WEAK + deep-dd" là bucket tốt nhất** (mua đáy). Với **đường thì ngược hẳn**: WEAK+deep-dd là bucket **tệ nhất** (−4%/1Y), còn GOOD+deep-dd mới là tốt nhất (+29%/1Y, 72% win). Spread WEAK−GOOD **âm ở cả 5/5 mã** (SLS −2pp, SBT −6pp, LSS −13pp, KTS −23pp, QNS −14pp).

### Quy luật cho nhóm đường (khác bản chất)

**Đường là cyclical theo XU HƯỚNG (momentum/trend), không phải mean-reversion.** Lý do cấu trúc:
- Thép/cao su: giá cao → kích cung → giá sập (hog cycle) → contrarian "mua đáy" thắng.
- Đường VN: nguồn cung **thiếu cấu trúc + được bảo hộ** (quota + thuế AD). Cung phản ứng **rất chậm** (mía 12-18 tháng, vùng nguyên liệu bị phá trong đợt sập 2018-2020 không hồi nhanh). Nên giá lên thì **kéo dài**, và đáy (WEAK) là một **bãi lầy dài** (diện tích mía teo dần) — deep-dd lúc đó là **value trap**, không phải đáy.

→ **Mua khi giá đường GOOD (trên median 36 tháng / đang lên), ưu tiên lúc cổ phiếu vừa chỉnh sâu (buy-the-dip trong uptrend). Tránh khi giá đường WEAK** — ngược hẳn quy tắc rubber.

Điều này khớp với SLS bạn nêu: trough 2018-2019 (giá đường thế giới 0.24-0.31, WEAK, chưa bảo hộ) kéo dài → boom 2022-2024 (giá 0.42-0.58 GOOD + thuế AD bảo hộ từ 6/2021).

### Trạng thái HIỆN TẠI = cảnh báo kép

1. **Giá đường thế giới WEAK**: 0.33 USD/kg, **percentile 5 năm = 0.08** (gần đáy 5 năm), đã rớt từ đỉnh 0.58 (9/2023). Theo quy luật đường → **WAIT/AVOID, chưa phải vùng mua.**
2. **SLS Q1/2026 sụp**: NP 16 tỷ (từ ~100-235 tỷ/quý), ROE_tr 16.7% (từ 54%) → đang vào downcycle.
3. **Thuế AD đường Thái hết hạn 15/6/2026 — còn ~2 tuần**. MOIT đã mở rà soát cuối kỳ (Quyết định 1686/QĐ-BCT, 13/6/2025). Đây là biến nhị phân: **gia hạn** → giữ sàn giá nội địa; **bãi bỏ** → đường Thái (cả nhập lậu lẫn chính ngạch) tràn về → ép giá nội địa → bearish thêm cho cả nhóm.

Cả 3 tín hiệu hiện **cùng chiều bearish**. Theo framework, nhóm đường giờ là **WAIT** — chờ giá đường đảo chiều lên (flip GOOD) + kết quả rà soát AD, không mua đáy theo phản xạ contrarian.

Nguồn: [MOIT end-of-term review](https://aslgate.com/vietnam-initiates-end-of-term-review-of-anti-dumping-and-countervailing-measures-on-sugar-imported-from-thailand/) · [VnExpress AD duty](https://e.vnexpress.net/news/economy/vietnam-imposes-anti-dumping-duty-on-thai-origin-sugar-4495092.html) · [S&P 5-ASEAN anti-circumvention](https://www.spglobal.com/commodityinsights/en/market-insights/latest-news/agriculture/080222-vietnam-imposes-4764-anti-circumvention-duty-on-sugar-imports-from-5-asean-countries)

---

Files đã tạo: [data/sugar_monthly.csv](data/sugar_monthly.csv) (240 tháng giá đường USD/kg), [sugar_cyclical.py](sugar_cyclical.py), [data/sugar_cyclical.md](data/sugar_cyclical.md).

Lưu ý tích hợp: **không thể thả đường vào `COMMODITY_MAP` của `unified_screener.py` như cũ** — vì `eval_cyclical()` dùng logic contrarian (pctile<0.40 + deep = TROUGH_BUY), sẽ ra tín hiệu **SAI ngược** cho đường. Đường cần một nhánh "trend-cyclical" riêng.

Để tôi lưu lại phát hiện này vào memory đã.

input.content:
---
name: sugar-cyclical-trend-2026
description: Sugar (SLS/SBT/LSS/KTS/QNS) is a TREND cyclical — inverts the contrarian rule that works for rubber/steel/urea/dap
metadata:
  type: project
---

Added SUGAR to the 8L cyclical family ([REDACTED]01, user request). Driver = world sugar price (USD/kg, Thai-export anchored), `data/sugar_monthly.csv` (240mo 2006→2026-03 via indexmundi). Group ICB 3577: **SLS, SBT, LSS, KTS, QNS** (QNS hybrid — Vinasoy ~half profit). Script `sugar_cyclical.py` → `data/sugar_cyclical.md`.

**KEY FINDING — sugar INVERTS the contrarian pattern.** For rubber/steel/urea/dap, "commodity WEAK + deep-dd" was the BEST bucket (buy trough). For sugar it's the WORST: WEAK+deep-dd 1Y **−4%/41%win**; GOOD+deep-dd 1Y **+29%/72%win**. Spread WEAK−GOOD is NEGATIVE for all 5/5 tickers (SLS −2, SBT −6, LSS −13, KTS −23, QNS −14 pp). → **Sugar = TREND/momentum cyclical: buy when sugar price GOOD (>36m median), ideally on a stock pullback (dip-in-uptrend); AVOID when WEAK.** Opposite of [[cyclical-commodity-framework-2026]].

**WHY structural:** VN sugar = structural deficit + PROTECTED (import quota + anti-dumping). Supply response is slow (cane 12-18mo; acreage destroyed in 2018-20 bust doesn't rebuild fast) → high prices PERSIST and troughs are long grinds (WEAK deep-dd = value trap, not a V-bottom). Unlike steel/rubber hog-cycle where high price kills itself.

**Protection overlay (the structural layer, like rubber deficit / DGC oil-anchor):** VN anti-dumping 47.64% on Thai sugar official Jun-2021 (5y) + 47.64% anti-circumvention on 5 ASEAN re-routers Aug-2022. Decoupled domestic price UP 2022-24 → drove SLS boom (NP peak Q2/23 224bn, Q2/24 235bn, ROE_tr 54%) alongside world deficit (India export ban, sugar 0.58 peak 9/2023).

**CURRENT STATE 2026-06 = triple bearish:** (1) world sugar WEAK 0.33, pctile5y **0.08** (near 5y low, off 0.58 peak); (2) SLS Q1/26 NP collapsed to 16bn / ROE_tr 16.7% (downcycle); (3) **AD duty EXPIRES 15-Jun-2026** — MOIT end-of-term review Decision 1686/QD-BCT (13-Jun-2025) pending: extend=floor holds, revoke=Thai sugar floods→domestic price pressure. Framework verdict = **WAIT** (not contrarian-buy); wait for sugar regime flip GOOD + AD review outcome.

**Integration caveat:** do NOT drop sugar into `unified_screener.py` COMMODITY_MAP — its `eval_cyclical()` uses contrarian logic (pctile<0.40+deep=TROUGH_BUY) which is INVERTED-WRONG for sugar. Needs a separate trend-cyclical branch. Data gap: domestic VN sugar price monthly (world price + protection premium − smuggling) — world price used as proxy.

P4 no history (DGC=DAP proxy). data/{urea,dap,iron_ore}_monthly.csv.

content.text:
Đã lưu vào memory. Tóm tắt quy luật nhóm đường tôi tìm được cho bạn:

> **Đường là cyclical THEO XU HƯỚNG, không phải mua-đáy.** Mua khi giá đường thế giới GOOD (>median 36T), tốt nhất lúc cổ phiếu vừa chỉnh sâu (+29%/1Y, 72% win). TRÁNH khi giá WEAK — đáy đường là bãi lầy dài do cung phục hồi chậm + bảo hộ (WEAK+deep-dd chỉ −4%/1Y). Ngược hẳn rubber/thép. **Hiện tại = WAIT** (giá WEAK pctile 0.08 + SLS sụp LN + thuế AD hết hạn 15/6/2026).

Có 3 hướng đi tiếp, bạn muốn tôi làm cái nào?

Great! Now I found relevant information about refined sugar prices (RS and RE) in Vietnam. Based on the search results, here's what I found:

## Giá đường RS và RE tại Việt Nam

Giá đường RS (đường kính trắng) và RE (đường tinh luyện) trong nước tiếp tục tăng trong tháng 8 sau khi được giữ ổn định trong tháng 7; trong đó, giá đường RS giao ngay tại các nhà máy đường trong nước đã tăng trưởng vượt mức 18.000 đồng/kg.

### Dự báo giá đường 2026-2027

Trong giai đoạn 2026-2027, giá đường thành phẩm được dự báo sẽ dao động 18.000-24.000 đồng/kg.

### Biến động giá gần đây

Tại một số cửa hàng kinh doanh ở TPHCM, đường RE được chào bán ở chợ Bình Tây chỉ còn 10.200 đồng/kg và RS là 10.000 đồng/kg.

Lưu ý rằng giá đường dao động theo nhiều yếu tố như giá đường thế giới, chi phí sản xuất, chính sách nhập khẩu và biến đổi khí hậu, vì vậy giá có thể thay đổi tùy theo thời điểm và địa phương.

content.text:
Giá đường **nội địa VN không có chuỗi monthly miễn phí** (chỉ có điểm rời rạc: RS spot ~18.000đ/kg gần đây, dự báo 18.000–24.000đ/kg 2026-27; chuỗi tuần do VSSA/CZapp giữ sau paywall). Nên world price + lớp phủ bảo hộ vẫn là proxy thực dụng nhất — tôi ghi nhận giới hạn này.

Giờ làm phần chính: **tích hợp nhánh trend-cyclical** vào `unified_screener.py` và `rank_8l.py`. Tôi sửa cẩn thận từng chỗ.

input.old_string: "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap","CSV":"dap"}  # DGC/CSV = phosphate-chain proxy (real P4 has no series)
input.new_string:
"DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap","CSV":"dap"}  # DGC/CSV = phosphate-chain proxy (real P4 has no series)

# SUGAR group (ICB 3577) — a TREND cyclical, NOT contrarian (validated sugar_cyclical.py 2026-06):
# WEAK+deep-dd = WORST bucket (1Y -4%/41%win), GOOD+deep-dd = BEST (+29%/72%win); spread negative
# all 5/5 tickers. Structural deficit + import protection (quota + anti-dumping) => high prices
# PERSIST and troughs are long value-traps (cane acreage rebuilds slowly). So BUY on a GOOD regime
# (ideally a stock pullback = dip-in-uptrend), AVOID/WAIT on WEAK. Driver = world sugar (USD/kg).
# DO NOT add to COMMODITY_MAP: eval_cyclical()'s contrarian logic would invert the signal.
SUGAR_SET={"SLS","SBT","LSS","KTS","QNS"}  # QNS hybrid (Vinasoy ~half profit → weaker pure-sugar read)
SUGAR_AD_EXPIRY="[REDACTED]15"  # Thai anti-dumping 47.64% end-of-term; MOIT review pending (binary catalyst)

content.text:
Tích hợp hoàn tất và tự nhất quán: cả nhóm đường nằm cuối bảng xếp hạng (hạng 111-119/119) — đúng với trạng thái WAIT hiện tại. Thứ tự nội bộ cũng hợp lý (SLS/QNS chất lượng nhất ở trên, LSS yếu nhất ở đáy).

Đã xong cả 4 việc bạn chọn. Tổng kết:

## 1. Nhánh trend-cyclical — ĐÃ tích hợp ✅
- `unified_screener.py`: thêm route **SUGAR** (5 mã ICB 3577) với `eval_sugar()` logic **đảo ngược** contrarian (mua GOOD-regime/dip, tránh WEAK). Không thả vào `COMMODITY_MAP` để tránh `eval_cyclical` chấm sai.
- `rank_8l.py`: thêm nhánh scoring SUGAR (thưởng GOOD+dip, phạt WEAK downcycle).
- Verify: cả 5 mã → `DOWNCYCLE_LOW / WAIT`, rank 111-119/119. Pipeline chạy sạch.

## 2. Soi sâu từng mã (dna_card) — bối cảnh downcycle
| Mã | Engine / ROIC | Moat (ROE) | Margin-cycle | Đọc |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **SLS** | COMPOUNDER, ROIC 29% | MODERATE (ROE 37%) | MID (GPM pctile 0.52) | Vận hành tốt nhất, PB 0.83, nhưng **biên chưa crushed → còn dư địa giảm** nếu giá đường rớt tiếp |
| **QNS** | COMPOUNDER, ROIC 16% | **STRONG (ROE 22%)** | MID (0.64) | Hybrid Vinasoy → **ít cyclical nhất**, chất lượng cao, liq đang tăng |
| **SBT** | LOWROIC 5%, **pha loãng +35%/3y** | WEAK (ROE 8%) | MARGIN_BOTTOM (0.13) | Engine yếu, pha loãng nặng, CFO TTM −1.132 tỷ |
| **KTS** | LOWROIC 10% | WEAK (ROE 12%) | MARGIN_BOTTOM (0.23) | dd −58% (sâu nhất), biên đã đáy |
| **LSS** | LOWROIC 5% | WEAK (ROE 4%) | MID (0.58) | Yếu nhất nhóm |

Điểm đáng chú ý: **SLS biên gộp mới ở pctile 0.52 (chưa crushed)** trong khi SBT/KTS đã MARGIN_BOTTOM — tức nếu giá đường tiếp tục yếu, SLS còn chỗ để LN giảm thêm (Q1/26 đã sụp về 16 tỷ là tín hiệu đầu). Khi regime đảo lên, SLS (ROIC 29%, ít pha loãng) là mã chất lượng nhất để "mua dip trong uptrend"; QNS phòng thủ nhất nhờ mảng sữa.

## 3. Giá đường nội địa VN — giới hạn dữ liệu
Không có chuỗi monthly miễn phí (chỉ điểm rời rạc: RS spot ~18.000đ/kg, dự báo 18-24k 2026-27; chuỗi tuần của VSSA/CZapp sau paywall). World price + lớp phủ bảo hộ vẫn là proxy. Đây là khoảng trống dữ liệu duy nhất còn lại (giống P4/lưu huỳnh của DGC).

## 4. Theo dõi rà soát AD
Mốc cứng: thuế AD đường Thái **hết hạn 15/6/2026**; MOIT đang rà soát cuối kỳ (QĐ 1686/QĐ-BCT). Kết quả là biến nhị phân quyết hướng cả nhóm — đã ghi vào memory để mỗi lần bàn nhóm đường đều nhắc.

Vì có mốc ngày cụ thể (15/6/2026) và bạn đã chọn theo dõi: muốn tôi `/schedule` một lần kiểm tra kết quả rà soát AD vào **~16/6/2026** (web-check quyết định MOIT + cập nhật verdict nhóm đường) không?

Create a one-time scheduled agent to run on [REDACTED] (after the Thai sugar anti-dumping duty expires/review concludes on [REDACTED]15) that produces an updated report for the Vietnamese sugar group.

The scheduled agent should:
1. WebSearch for the MOIT (Bộ Công Thương) end-of-term review decision on the Thai sugar anti-dumping duty (Decision 1686/QD-BCT, expiry [REDACTED]15) — was it extended or revoked? This is the binary catalyst.
2. WebFetch latest world sugar price (indexmundi.com/commodities/?commodity=sugar) and append new month(s) to data/sugar_monthly.csv.
3. Re-run sugar_cyclical.py and unified_screener.py + rank_8l.py to refresh the sugar-group regime and ranking.
4. Pull latest SLS/SBT/LSS/KTS/QNS quarterly NP from BigQuery to check if the downcycle deepened or turned.
5. Write a concise update report covering: AD decision outcome + impact, current sugar regime (GOOD/WEAK + pctile), per-ticker verdicts, and whether the framework verdict has flipped from WAIT to a buy zone.

Context: sugar is a TREND cyclical (buy GOOD-regime dips, avoid WEAK — inverts the contrarian rule). As of [REDACTED]01 the group is triple-bearish (world sugar 0.33/pctile 0.08, SLS Q1/26 NP collapsed to 16bn, AD expiry pending) → verdict WAIT. content.text:
# Schedule Remote Agents

You are helping the user schedule, update, list, or run **remote** Claude Code agents. These are NOT local cron jobs — each routine spawns a fully isolated remote session (CCR) in Anthropic's cloud infrastructure, either on a recurring cron schedule or once at a specific time. The agent runs in a sandboxed environment with its own git checkout, tools, and optional MCP connections.

## First Step

The user has already told you what they want (see User Request at the bottom). Skip the initial question and go directly to the matching workflow.

## Setup Notes

⚠ Heads-up:
- Not in a git repo — you'll need to specify a repo URL manually (or skip repos entirely).
- No MCP connectors — connect at https://claude.ai/customize/connectors if needed.


## What You Can Do

Use the `RemoteTrigger` tool (load it first with `ToolSearch select:RemoteTrigger`; auth is handled in-process — do not use curl):

- `{action: "list"}` — list all routines
- `{action: "get", trigger_id: "..."}` — fetch one routine
- `{action: "create", body: {...}}` — create a routine
- `{action: "update", trigger_id: "...", body: {...}}` — partial update
- `{action: "run", trigger_id: "..."}` — run a routine now

(Note: the API uses `trigger_id` as the parameter name, but the user-facing term is "routine".)

You CANNOT delete routines. If the user asks to delete, direct them to: https://claude.ai/code/routines

## Create body shape

For a recurring schedule:

```json
{
  "name": "AGENT_NAME",
  "cron_expression": "CRON_EXPR",
  "enabled": true,
  "job_config": {
    "ccr": {
      "environment_id": "ENVIRONMENT_ID",
      "session_context": {
        "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
        "sources": [
          {"git_repository": {"url": "https://github.com/ORG/REPO"}}
        ],
        "allowed_tools": ["Bash", "Read", "Write", "Edit", "Glob", "Grep"]
      },
      "events": [
        {"data": {
          "uuid": "<lowercase v4 uuid>",
          "session_id": "",
          "type": "user",
          "parent_tool_use_id": null,
          "message": {"content": "PROMPT_HERE", "role": "user"}
        }}
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

For a one-time run, replace `"cron_expression": "CRON_EXPR"` with `"run_once_at": "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ"` (RFC3339 UTC, must be in the future). Everything else is identical.

Generate a fresh lowercase UUID for `events[].data.uuid` yourself.

## Available MCP Connectors

These are the user's currently connected claude.ai MCP connectors:

No connected MCP connectors found. The user may need to connect servers at https://claude.ai/customize/connectors

When attaching connectors to a routine, use the `connector_uuid` and `name` shown above (the name is already sanitized to only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores), and the connector's URL. The `name` field in `mcp_connections` must only contain `[a-zA-Z0-9_-]` — dots and spaces are NOT allowed.

**Important:** Infer what services the agent needs from the user's description. For example, if they say "check Datadog and Slack me errors," the agent needs both Datadog and Slack connectors. Cross-reference against the list above and warn if any required service isn't connected. If a needed connector is missing, direct the user to https://claude.ai/customize/connectors to connect it first.

## Environments

Every routine requires an `environment_id` in the job config. This determines where the remote agent runs. Ask the user which environment to use.

Available environments:
- Default (id: env_01SFhDSUR1eL7X4Y7T6d3NC8, kind: anthropic_cloud)

Use the `id` value as the `environment_id` in `job_config.ccr.environment_id`.


## API Field Reference

### Create Routine — Required Fields
- `name` (string) — A descriptive name
- Exactly ONE of:
  - `cron_expression` (string) — 5-field cron in UTC. **Minimum interval is 1 hour.**
  - `run_once_at` (string) — RFC3339 UTC timestamp. Must be in the future. Fires once, then auto-disables.
- `job_config` (object) — Session configuration (see structure above)

### Create Routine — Optional Fields
- `enabled` (boolean, default: true)
- `mcp_connections` (array) — MCP servers to attach:
  ```json
  [{"connector_uuid": "uuid", "name": "server-name", "url": "https://..."}]
  ```

### Update Routine — Optional Fields
All fields optional (partial update):
- `name`, `cron_expression`, `run_once_at`, `enabled`, `job_config`
- `mcp_connections` — Replace MCP connections
- `clear_mcp_connections` (boolean) — Remove all MCP connections

### Cron Expression Examples

The user's local timezone is **Asia/Saigon**. Cron expressions and `run_once_at` timestamps are [REDACTED] in UTC. When the user says a local time, convert it to UTC but confirm with them: "9am Asia/Saigon = Xam UTC, so the cron would be `0 X * * 1-5`." For one-time runs, the same conversion applies — "run this at 3pm" → `"run_once_at": "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:00:00Z"` with their 3pm converted to UTC.

- `0 9 * * 1-5` — Every weekday at 9am **UTC**
- `0 */2 * * *` — Every 2 hours
- `0 0 * * *` — Daily at midnight **UTC**
- `30 14 * * 1` — Every Monday at 2:30pm **UTC**
- `0 8 1 * *` — First of every month at 8am **UTC**

Minimum interval is 1 hour. `*/30 * * * *` will be rejected.

### Current Time (for one-off runs)

When /schedule was invoked it was **Mon, Jun 1, 2026, 10:10 AM** (Asia/Saigon) / **[REDACTED]01T03:10:42.940Z** UTC. Treat this as an approximate anchor only — the conversation may have been running for a while since then.

**Before computing any `run_once_at` value, you MUST re-check the current time** by running `date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ` via the Bash tool. Do not guess or infer today's date from conversation context. Resolve relative requests ("tomorrow at 9am", "in 3 hours", "next Monday") against the freshly fetched time, then echo the resolved local time AND the UTC timestamp back to the user for confirmation before creating the routine. If the resolved time is already in the past, ask the user to clarify rather than silently rolling forward.

## Workflow

### CREATE a new routine:

1. **Understand the goal** — Ask what they want the remote agent to do. What repo(s)? What task? Remind them that the agent runs remotely — it won't have access to their local machine, local files, or local environment variables.
2. **Craft the prompt** — Help them write an effective agent prompt. Good prompts are:
   - Specific about what to do and what success looks like
   - Clear about which files/areas to focus on
   - Explicit about what actions to take (open PRs, commit, just analyze, etc.)
3. **Set the schedule** — Ask when and how often. The user's timezone is Asia/Saigon. When they say a time (e.g., "every morning at 9am"), assume they mean their local time and convert to UTC for the cron expression. Always confirm the conversion: "9am Asia/Saigon = Xam UTC." If they want a one-time run (e.g., "once at 3pm", "tomorrow morning", "remind me to check X later"), use `run_once_at` instead of `cron_expression` — same timezone conversion applies. **First re-check the current time with `date -u` via Bash** (the reference time above may be stale in a long conversation), resolve the relative phrase against that fresh value, and confirm the resulting absolute timestamp with the user.
4. **Choose the model** — Default to `claude-sonnet-4-6`. Tell the user which model you're defaulting to and ask if they want a different one.
5. **Validate connections** — Infer what services the agent will need from the user's description. For example, if they say "check Datadog and Slack me errors," the agent needs both Datadog and Slack MCP connectors. Cross-reference with the connectors list above. If any are missing, warn the user and link them to https://claude.ai/customize/connectors to connect first. Ask which git repos the remote agent needs cloned into its environment.
6. **Review and confirm** — Show the full configuration before creating. Let them adjust.
7. **Create it** — Call `RemoteTrigger` with `action: "create"` and show the result. The response includes the routine ID. Always output a link at the end: `https://claude.ai/code/routines/{ROUTINE_ID}`

### UPDATE a routine:

1. List routines first so they can pick one
2. Ask what they want to change
3. Show current vs proposed value
4. Confirm and update

### LIST routines:

1. Fetch and display in a readable format
2. Show: name, schedule (human-readable), enabled/disabled, next run, repo(s)

### RUN NOW:

1. List routines if they haven't specified which one
2. Confirm which routine
3. Execute and confirm

## Important Notes

- These are REMOTE agents — they run in Anthropic's cloud, not on the user's machine. They cannot access local files, local services, or local environment variables.
- Always convert cron to human-readable when displaying
- When listing routines, `ended_reason: "run_once_fired"` means a one-shot already ran (shows as "Ran" in the web UI). The user can re-arm it by updating with a new `run_once_at`.
- Default to `enabled: true` unless user says otherwise
- Accept GitHub URLs in any format (https://github.com/org/repo, org/repo, etc.) and normalize to the full HTTPS URL (without .git suffix)
- The prompt is the most important part — spend time getting it right. The remote agent starts with zero context, so the prompt must be self-contained.
- To delete a routine, direct users to https://claude.ai/code/routines


## User Request

The user said: "Create a one-time scheduled agent to run on [REDACTED] (after the Thai sugar anti-dumping duty expires/review concludes on [REDACTED]15) that produces an updated report for the Vietnamese sugar group.

The scheduled agent should:
1. WebSearch for the MOIT (Bộ Công Thương) end-of-term review decision on the Thai sugar anti-dumping duty (Decision 1686/QD-BCT, expiry [REDACTED]15) — was it extended or revoked? This is the binary catalyst.
2. WebFetch latest world sugar price (indexmundi.com/commodities/?commodity=sugar) and append new month(s) to data/sugar_monthly.csv.
3. Re-run sugar_cyclical.py and unified_screener.py + rank_8l.py to refresh the sugar-group regime and ranking.
4. Pull latest SLS/SBT/LSS/KTS/QNS quarterly NP from BigQuery to check if the downcycle deepened or turned.
5. Write a concise update report covering: AD decision outcome + impact, current sugar regime (GOOD/WEAK + pctile), per-ticker verdicts, and whether the framework verdict has flipped from WAIT to a buy zone.

Context: sugar is a TREND cyclical (buy GOOD-regime dips, avoid WEAK — inverts the contrarian rule). As of [REDACTED]01 the group is triple-bearish (world sugar 0.33/pctile 0.08, SLS Q1/26 NP collapsed to 16bn, AD expiry pending) → verdict WAIT. Files: sugar_cyclical.py, data/sugar_monthly.csv, unified_screener.py (SUGAR route), rank_8l.py. Memory: sugar_cyclical_trend_2026. Working dir: /home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude."

Start by understanding their intent and working through the appropriate workflow above.

content.text:
Ràng buộc quan trọng: **remote agent chạy trên cloud của Anthropic, KHÔNG truy cập được máy local của bạn** — nghĩa là nó không chạy được `sugar_cyclical.py`/`unified_screener.py`, không vào được BigQuery (auth nằm ở máy bạn), không đọc/ghi `data/sugar_monthly.csv`. Workspace của bạn cũng không phải git repo nên không clone lên cloud được.

→ Vậy bước 2-4 (chạy script + BQ + cập nhật CSV) **không thể làm từ xa**. Nhưng phần **quan trọng nhất — quyết định AD (catalyst nhị phân) + giá đường thế giới mới nhất — đều web-fetch được**. Nên tôi đề xuất chia làm 2:

**Remote agent (tự động, 16/6/2026)** — làm phần web, ra report sơ bộ:
- Tra quyết định MOIT về gia hạn/bãi bỏ thuế AD đường Thái (hết hạn 15/6).
- Lấy giá đường thế giới mới nhất (indexmundi) → đọc regime GOOD/WEAK + percentile.
- Kết luận: AD outcome tác động gì + verdict nhóm đường có nên flip khỏi WAIT chưa.
- Report hiển thị ở claude.ai/code/routines.

**Phần quant đầy đủ (script + BQ + cập nhật CSV)** — để dành chạy local: lần sau bạn mở máy sau 15/6, ping tôi một câu là tôi chạy full pipeline + soi LN quý mới của 5 mã.

Cấu hình đề xuất cho remote agent:

| Mục | Giá trị |
|---|---|
| Thời điểm | **16/6/2026 09:00 Asia/Saigon** = `[REDACTED]2:00:00Z` |
| Loại | Chạy 1 lần (run_once) |
| Model | claude-sonnet-4-6 (web research) |
| Repo | Không (web-only) |
| Tools | WebSearch, WebFetch, Read, Write |

Bạn duyệt cấu hình này (đặc biệt: chấp nhận remote chỉ làm phần web, quant để chạy local) thì tôi tạo luôn? Hoặc muốn đổi ngày/giờ/model gì không?

body.name: Sugar group update — post AD-duty review (Jun 2026)

message.content:
You are producing a web-research UPDATE REPORT on the Vietnamese SUGAR stock group. You run remotely with web access only (no local files, no BigQuery, no scripts) — so do the web-research half and write a self-contained report. State explicitly that the local quantitative refresh (running sugar_cyclical.py / unified_screener.py / rank_8l.py and pulling BigQuery quarterly NP) must be done later on the user's local machine.

BACKGROUND (the framework, established [REDACTED]01):
- The sugar group = SLS, SBT, LSS, KTS, QNS (Vietnam, ICB 3577). QNS is a hybrid (Vinasoy soymilk ~half of profit, least sugar-cyclical).
- KEY RULE: sugar is a TREND cyclical, which INVERTS the usual contrarian commodity rule. Event-study verdict: buy when sugar price is in a GOOD regime (above its trailing 36-month median), ideally on a stock pullback (dip-in-uptrend); AVOID/WAIT when the sugar regime is WEAK. Reason: Vietnam sugar is a structural deficit + protected market, so high prices persist and troughs are long value-traps (cane acreage rebuilds slowly). 'Buy the trough' does NOT work for sugar.
- STRUCTURAL OVERLAY: Vietnam imposed a 47.64% anti-dumping (AD) duty on Thai sugar (official Jun-2021, 5 years) plus a 47.64% anti-circumvention duty on 5 ASEAN re-routers (Aug-2022). This decoupled the domestic sugar price upward in 2022-2024 and drove the profit boom. The AD duty is scheduled to EXPIRE 15-Jun-2026; MOIT (Bộ Công Thương) opened an end-of-term review (Decision 1686/QD-BCT, 13-Jun-2025) to decide whether to extend or revoke it. THIS IS THE BINARY CATALYST.
- STATE AS OF [REDACTED]01 was TRIPLE-BEARISH → verdict WAIT: (1) world sugar price 0.33 USD/kg, 5-year percentile only 0.08 (near 5y low, off the 0.58 peak of Sep-2023) = WEAK regime; (2) SLS Q1/2026 net profit collapsed to ~16bn VND (from ~100-235bn/quarter peaks), ROE_trailing fell to ~17% (from 54%); (3) AD expiry pending.

TASKS:
1) WebSearch (English and Vietnamese) for the MOIT end-of-term review OUTCOME on the Thai sugar anti-dumping/countervailing duty (Decision 1686/QD-BCT, expiry 15-Jun-2026): was it EXTENDED, REVOKED, or still pending/delayed? Search terms like: 'MOIT thuế chống bán phá giá đường Thái Lan gia hạn 2026', 'Vietnam anti-dumping Thai sugar review decision June 2026', 'rà soát cuối kỳ đường Thái Lan kết quả'. Cite sources with URLs. If no decision is announced yet, say so clearly and note the duty may have lapsed or been provisionally extended.
2) WebFetch https://www.indexmundi.com/commodities/?commodity=sugar&months=12&currency=usd to get the latest monthly world sugar price (USD/kg). Report the last few months and the current level.
3) Assess the sugar REGIME: compare the latest world sugar price to a rough trailing-36-month median (~0.42-0.45 USD/kg based on 2023-2025 history). Is it GOOD (above) or WEAK (below)? Roughly where in its 5-year range (the 5y range has been ~0.23 low to ~0.58 high)?
4) Write a concise report (markdown) titled 'Sugar group update — <date>' covering: (a) AD review decision outcome and its impact (extend = domestic price floor maintained = supportive; revoke = Thai sugar floods back = bearish pressure on domestic prices); (b) current world sugar regime (GOOD/WEAK + rough percentile); (c) whether the framework verdict should FLIP from WAIT to a buy-zone — remember the rule: flip to buy only if regime turns GOOD (price back above ~0.42-0.45 and rising), NOT because prices fell further; (d) per-ticker note: SLS (best operator, ROIC ~29%, watch if profit downcycle deepened or turned), QNS (most defensive via Vinasoy), SBT/LSS/KTS (weaker, heavily diluted/low-ROIC). (e) An explicit TODO list of the local-only steps the user must run to complete the quant refresh: append new month(s) to data/sugar_monthly.csv, re-run sugar_cyclical.py + unified_screener.py + rank_8l.py, and pull latest SLS/SBT/LSS/KTS/QNS quarterly NP from BigQuery (tav2_bq.ticker_financial).

Keep the report focused and decision-oriented. The bottom line the user wants: did the AD catalyst resolve, did sugar prices turn, and is the group still WAIT or now a buy?

content.text:
Đã tạo xong routine ✅

| Mục | Giá trị |
|---|---|
| Tên | Sugar group update — post AD-duty review (Jun 2026) |
| Chạy | **16/6/2026 15:00 Asia/Saigon** (`[REDACTED]8:00:00Z`), một lần |
| Model | claude-sonnet-4-6 |
| Phạm vi | Web-only: quyết định AD + giá đường thế giới + verdict |

Report sẽ xuất hiện tại: **https://claude.ai/code/routines/trig_01FWJfPvP3cKeKhKYoGCn2T4**

Remote agent sẽ trả lời đúng câu hỏi cốt lõi: **(1)** thuế AD được gia hạn hay bãi bỏ, **(2)** giá đường đã đảo chiều chưa, **(3)** nhóm đường vẫn WAIT hay đã thành buy-zone — kèm checklist các bước quant cần chạy local (cập nhật `sugar_monthly.csv`, chạy lại 3 script, kéo LN quý mới từ BQ).

Lưu ý: chạy lúc 15h chiều 16/6 là hợp lý để tin AD đã rõ, nhưng nếu MOIT công bố trễ thì agent sẽ ghi rõ "chưa có quyết định". Khi đó (hoặc bất cứ lúc nào sau 15/6 bạn mở máy) chỉ cần ping tôi, tôi chạy full pipeline local + soi LN quý mới của 5 mã để khép lại report.

Tóm tắt cả phiên: nhóm đường giờ đã là một route **SUGAR** chính thức trong 8L với quy luật **trend-cyclical** (ngược contrarian), hiện trạng **WAIT** (bearish kép), và đã có lịch tự cập nhật sau mốc AD 15/6.
